# Renoject

> UK property investment toolkit — BTL & BRRR calculators, HMO compliance, market search, renovation cost estimates, and a trusted tradesmen directory.

Renoject is a free web app for UK property investors, landlords, and developers. It combines deal-analysis calculators, live market search, HMO licensing checks, refurbishment costing, long-term cashflow forecasting, and a vetted contractor directory in one place.

## Tools

- [Property Calculator](/refinance): BTL and BRRR returns — mortgage, cash, yield, ROI, refinance projections.
- [Renovation Calculator](/condition): Itemised refurbishment cost estimates for UK properties.
- [HMO Floorplan Compliance](/hmo-compliance): Check a floorplan against UK HMO licensing rules (room sizes, amenities, fire safety).
- [Market Search](/market): Live UK property deal matching across multiple listing sources.
- [View Deals](/properties): Curated investment opportunities sourced and analysed by Renoject.
- [Forecast](/forecast): Long-term cashflow projections — rent growth, capital appreciation, refinance windows.
- [Tradesmen Directory](/tradesmen): Trusted UK contractor network with reviews and trade-specific analysis.
- [Tokenize](/tokenize): Fractionalise property equity for shared ownership and investor pools.

## Optional
